summary: Completed comprehensive testing of KOLOR STUDIO File Attachments feature - all backend APIs (16/16) and frontend features working correctly. Files can be uploaded, viewed, downloaded, and deleted via Supabase Storage.

minor.issue: File deletion logs activity as 'NOTE_ADDED' type instead of 'FILE_DELETED' type

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/leads/:leadId/files requires authentication (401)
Backend: POST /api/leads/:leadId/files requires authentication (401)
Backend: DELETE /api/files/:fileId requires authentication (401)
Backend: GET /api/files/:fileId/download requires authentication (401)
Backend: GET /api/leads/:leadId/files returns files with correct structure (id, filename, originalName, mimeType, size, formattedSize, category, url, createdAt)
Backend: GET /api/leads/:leadId/files returns 404 for invalid lead ID
Backend: POST /api/leads/:leadId/files uploads text file successfully (201)
Backend: Multiple file upload works (2 files at once)
Backend: Upload returns 400 when no files provided
Backend: Upload returns 404 for invalid lead ID
Backend: FILE_UPLOADED activity is logged after file upload
Backend: GET /api/files/:fileId/download returns signed URL
Backend: Download returns 404 for invalid file ID
Backend: DELETE /api/files/:fileId successfully removes file (200)
Backend: Deleted file returns 404 when accessed
Backend: Delete returns 404 for invalid file ID
Frontend: LeadDetailModal opens correctly when clicking lead card
Frontend: Files tab appears with paperclip icon
Frontend: Files tab shows file count badge when files exist
Frontend: Drag and drop upload area is displayed
Frontend: Browse button opens file chooser
Frontend: File upload via browse button works
Frontend: Uploaded files appear in list immediately
Frontend: File cards show correct info (name, size, timestamp)
Frontend: Download button present on file cards
Frontend: Delete button present on file cards
Frontend: Delete confirmation UI shows Confirm/Cancel buttons
Frontend: Cancel button in delete confirmation preserves file
Frontend: Empty state shows when no files uploaded
action_items: Consider adding FILE_DELETED activity type instead of using NOTE_ADDED for file deletions (minor improvement)
critical_code_review_comments: File deletion activity logs as NOTE_ADDED with description 'Deleted file: X' - should use dedicated FILE_DELETED type for better activity filtering
data-testid attributes properly implemented for testability
Good UX: Delete confirmation prevents accidental deletions
File upload properly refreshes both files list and activities
seed_data_creation: Test files were uploaded and cleaned up during testing. Original test_upload.txt preserved.
context_for_next_testing_agent: File Attachments feature is fully functional. Supabase Storage bucket 'lead-files' is working. Files are stored with signed URLs that expire after 1 year (upload) and 1 hour (download). Activities are logged for file uploads. Lead 'MINE' (ID: e9b717a1-cd5f-4654-aa14-7f7ed7ce9594) has test_upload.txt file available for testing.
